rulings.Case Title: CYRUS LAFARRE VS. U.S. BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE FOR WF et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 2, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT U.S. BANK's DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurer to Second Amended Complaint is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 1st, 3rd, and 4th causes of action to allege specific fact, more than belated assignment, showing that defendant has no right to foreclose. See Frazier. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to 5th cause of action to allege damages caused by defendant's misrepresentations. Demurrer is overruled as to the 2nd cause of action. See Onofrio, Frazier and Vogan. = (KT/501)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Coscaya'S Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 2, 2012, line 4. Defendant Coscaya's Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint. Defendant's Motion to Strike is GRANTED. = (KT/501)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Coscaya'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 2, 2012, line 4. Defendant Coscaya's Demurrer To First Amended Complaint. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 3rd cause of action. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 5th cause of action allege specific incidents. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the 7th, 8th and 9th causes of action. = (KT/501)

rulings.Case Title: MIREYA THUMAS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 2, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is continued to August 17, 2012. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C by August 9, 2012 4 pm. Opposing party is ordered to re-submit their opposition papers complying with CRC 3.1113(c) and (f) by August 9, 2012 4 pm. = (KT/501)

rulings.Case Title: MIREYA THUMAS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Joinder To Demurrer Of Deft To Pltd'S Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 2, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT REGIONAL SERVICE CORPORATION'S Joinder To Demurrer Of Defendant To Plaintiff's Amended Complaint. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is continued to August 17, 2012. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C by August 9, 2012 4 pm. Opposing party is ordered to re-submit their opposition papers complying with CRC 3.1113(c) and (f) by August 9, 2012 4 pm. Judge Ksenia Tsenin, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (KT/501)

rulings.Case Title: GLORIA DELAO VS. HERMILA ALVAREZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 2, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs HERMILA ALVAREZ and LIZANDRO ALVAREZ's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is sustained without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. = (KT/501)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD RESMA VS. ANDREW H RAGLAND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 2, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT ANDREW RAGLAND's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is sustained with leave to amend to allege compliance with or exemption from SFRO. = (KT/501)

rulings.Case Title: ZAHID SHAIKH VS. ANTONIO J. GUNNELLS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 2, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANT ANTONIO GUNNELLS'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Defendant's Motion to Strike is moot. = (KT/501)

rulings.Case Title: JEANNE MAZERIS VS. MAUREENE BASS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 2, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT MAURENNE BASS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Defendant Bass' Motion to Quash Service of Summons is granted. Plaintiff failed to sustain her burden. Courtesy copy of Declaration of Robert Fischer is missing pages 2-5; 1 is interrupted in mid-sentence and 2 is missing. = (KT/501)

rulings.Case Title: JEANNE MAZERIS VS. MAUREENE BASS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 2, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT JANICE BOULDIN'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons. Defendant Bouldin's Motion to Quash Service of Summons is granted. Plaintiff failed to sustain her burden. Courtesy copy of Declaration of Robert Fischer is missing pages 2-5; paragraph 1 is interrupted in mid-sentence and paragraph 2 is missing. = (KT/501)
